sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66566" key="mesu/mnion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσύμνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, an exclamation <sense id="n66566.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the middle of a strophe</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Poëm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:7:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
